# PitchPerfect AI

> AI-powered sales pitch coach. Practice cold calls with realistic AI prospects, handle objections, and get instant scored feedback to close more deals.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of PitchPerfect AI and what it does.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind PitchPerfect AI.
- [Compare](/compare): How PitchPerfect AI compares to other sales training tools.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for individuals and teams.
- [Demo](/demo): Try a live AI roleplay demo without signing up.
- [Free Trial](/free-trial): Start a free trial with full features.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create an account.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your account.
